# Sitaram Hospital & ZEN Laser Procto Care — Dhule, Maharashtra, India

> Sitaram Hospital is a trusted multi-specialty hospital in Dhule, North Maharashtra, with over 40 years of compassionate, ethical, and affordable healthcare. It houses ZEN Laser Procto Care — a dedicated, internationally certified laser treatment centre for advanced, minimally invasive ano-rectal procedures. The hospital is founded and led by Dr. Ravindra S. Wankhedkar (National President, IMA 2018; Senior Surgeon & Coloproctologist) and Dr. Meena R. Wankhedkar (National Chairperson, IMA Women Doctors Wing; Family Physician & Obstetrician).

## Quick Reference

- **Hospital:** Sitaram Hospital / ZEN Laser Procto Care, Dhule
- **Address:** Bhangya Maruti Chowk, Lane No. 6, Dhule – 424001, Maharashtra, India
- **Phone:** 94212 79065 | 02562 – 235795 | 02562 – 297695
- **Website:** www.sita-ramhospital.com
- **OPD:** Mon–Sat · 10:00 AM–2:00 PM & 6:00 PM–9:00 PM · Sunday Closed
- **Established:** 1986 (Bhagirath Clinic → Devki Nursing Home → Sitaram Hospital)
- **Specialties:** Laser Proctology · General Surgery · Maternity & Gynaecology · Family Medicine

## ZEN Laser Procto Care — Proctology

The dedicated laser proctology unit within Sitaram Hospital. Uses internationally certified EUFOTON LASER and Neo V Laser (EU-certified). Dr. Ravindra Wankhedkar is trained in Advanced Laser Surgery for Proctology from Germany.

### Conditions Treated

- Piles (Haemorrhoids) — Grade I to Grade IV, internal and external
- Fissure in Ano — acute and chronic anal fissures
- Fistula in Ano — simple and complex fistula tracts, including high fistula
- Pilonidal Sinus — cysts / sinuses near the tailbone
- Perineal Tear — post-childbirth perineal injuries, Grade I–IV
- Recto-Vaginal Fistula (RVF) — abnormal opening between rectum and vagina
- Anal Stenosis — narrowing of the anal canal

### Key Procedures

- Advanced Laser Hemorrhoidoplasty — for Piles Grade I–IV
- DGHAL-RAR — Doppler-guided haemorrhoidal artery ligation with recto-anal repair
- Radio Frequency Ablation (RFA) — Dr.Oppel RF Electrosurgical Device
- FILAC — Fistula Laser Closure (sutureless, sphincter-preserving)
- VAAFT — Video Assisted Anal Fistula Treatment
- FiLaC — Laser Fistulotomy
- HAL-RAR Procedure — no excision, no cuts
- Ano-Recto Videoscopy — Full HD video-guided anoscopy
- Anal Sphincterometry — pressure measurement for diagnosis
- Micro Rectocam WiFi — wireless HD miniature camera
- Sclerotherapy — injection therapy for Grade I–II Piles
- Pilonidal Sinus Excision — laser / pit-picking technique

### Laser Benefits

- Minimal Pain · Day Care (same-day discharge) · No Cuts · No Stitches · Minimal Bleeding · Faster Recovery (3–5 days) · Lower Infection Risk · High Precision · 95%+ Success Rate · Low Recurrence

## Departments

### Surgery Department

Hernia Repair · Hydrocele Surgery · Laparotomy · Genito Urinary Surgery · Gastrointestinal Surgery · Laparoscopic Surgery · Dedicated General Surgery OT · Paediatric Surgery · Plastic & Reconstructive Surgery · Accident & Trauma Care (24 hrs) · Day Care Surgery

### Women's Department (Maternity & Gynaecology)

Well Women Clinic · Antenatal Care · Maternity Services (normal, assisted, caesarean) · Gynaecological Surgery (fibroids, ovarian cysts, ectopic pregnancy, prolapse)

### Family Physician

Diagnose & Treat Common Illnesses · Routine Health Checkups · Preventive Healthcare & Vaccinations · Chronic Disease Management (Diabetes, Hypertension) · Minor Injuries & Infections · Specialist Referrals · Maternal & Child Healthcare · Mental Health Assessment · Healthy Lifestyle Education · Minor Medical Procedures

## Our Doctors

### Dr. Ravindra S. Wankhedkar — Senior Surgeon & Laser Proctologist

MS (General Surgery), MBBS — B.J. Medical College, Pune · FIAMS (Coloproctology) · FCGP (Proctology) · FIIOPM (Australia) · Advanced Laser Surgery Training — Germany · National President IMA 2018 · Treasurer WMA 2019–21 · President SAARC Medical Association 2018–20 · National Chair UNESCO Bioethics · Hony. Professor of Surgery SBH Govt. Medical College · Member ASCRS USA

### Dr. Meena R. Wankhedkar — Family Physician & Obstetrician

MBBS — Lokmanya Tilak Municipal Medical College, Mumbai · FIAMS · FCGP · National Chairperson IMA Women Doctors Wing · Past President IMA Dhule · Member IMA Maharashtra State CWC · Advisor Socio-Medical Affairs WMA
